jurisdictions.name: Canada

sources.label: IRCC — eTA facts (eTA vs visitor visa)
IRCC — Apply for a visitor visa (TRV)
IRCC — Guide 5256 (applying for a visitor visa)
IRCC — Sign in / IRCC secure account

jurisdictions.notes: Temporary Resident Visa (visitor) via IRCC at rules+checklist depth; IRCC secure account login-walled. eTA-vs-TRV split load-bearing: visa-exempt fliers need an eTA (not TRV); visa-exempt land/sea entrants need neither; US citizens/green-card holders are eTA-exempt. TRV fees CAD 100 individual / 500 family(5+), biometrics 85 / 170 family cap. Super Visa requires 100000 medical insurance (health/hospitalization/repatriation, valid 1yr) + host LICO income; mandatory medical exam. Pending exact-page reconfirmation (pages 404'd on 2026-07-20): eTA 7 fee amount, biometrics 10-year reuse exact wording, visa photo spec exact mm, current LICO table.

jurisdictions.name: United Kingdom

sources.label: GOV.UK — Standard Visitor visa (overview, eligibility, fees)
GOV.UK — Apply for a Standard Visitor visa
GOV.UK — Standard Visitor visa: if you're under 18
GOV.UK — Get an electronic travel authorisation (ETA)
GOV.UK — Check if you need a UK visa
GOV.UK — TB tests for visa applicants
GOV.UK — Countries where you need a TB test

jurisdictions.notes: Two branches. Standard Visitor visa (GBP 135/6mo; medical 234/11mo; academic 234/12mo; long-term 506/903/1128; transit 74.50) for visa nationals; ETA (GBP 20, valid 2yr or passport expiry) is NOT a visa and uses the UK ETA app/online flow. Route selection by nationality+purpose via the official check tool. TB certificate only for 6+ month stays from listed countries. UK moved to eVisas (UKVI account) replacing physical BRPs. Portal login-walled beyond public start page; rules+document-checklist depth. Verified live on gov.uk 2026-07-20.

sources.label: EU Commission — Visa Information System (VIS)
sources.authority: EU Commission (DG Migration and Home Affairs)

sources.label: EU Commission — ETIAS (updated 2025-10-06)
sources.authority: EU Commission (DG Migration and Home Affairs)

jurisdictions.notes: Uniform short-stay (Type C) visa, 90/180 rule, 30 participating countries. Core rules (fee EUR 90/45/35/67.50, responsible-post logic, 15-day/6-month timing, 15-45 day processing, ICAO photo, passport 3-months-beyond, fingerprints at submission) verified live against EU Commission pages 2026-07-20. TWO Visa Code figures could NOT be verified live (EUR-Lex HTTP 202 bot-challenge): the EUR 30000 travel-insurance minimum (Art. 15) and the 59-month fingerprint-reuse window (Art. 13) - both marked Pending official verification in the adapter. ETIAS is a separate NON-visa track for visa-exempt travellers and is NOT operational as of 2026-07-20; current ETIAS fee EUR 20. Per-country portals login-walled; rules+document-checklist depth.

jurisdictions.name: Australia

sources.label: Home Affairs — 600 Tourist stream (apply outside Australia)
Home Affairs — 600 Tourist stream (apply in Australia)
Home Affairs — 600 Approved Destination Status stream

jurisdictions.notes: Three parallel visitor routes. 601 ETA (app-only, AUD20 service charge) for a specific passport list; 651 eVisitor (ImmiAccount, free) for the European eligible list (UK British Citizen only, no BN(O)); 600 Visitor visa (ImmiAccount, form VSS-AP-600) for everyone else / criminal conviction / prior health failure / health-care environments / longer or sponsored stays. Streams: Tourist offshore (from AUD250), Tourist onshore (from AUD630), Business (250), Sponsored Family (250 + possible sponsor security bond), ADS (250), Frequent Traveller (1845, up to 10yr). Pacific Island/Timor-Leste concession + PNG changes from 1 July 2026; VAC changes on the 1 July annual cycle. ImmiAccount login-walled. 601 fee/list from page last updated 12/08/2025.

sources.authority: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan

sources.label: MOFA — Visa Processing Time
sources.authority: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan

jurisdictions.notes: Short-Term Stay (Temporary Visitor). Three branches: (1) visa exemption for 74 countries/regions per MOFA novisa page (Sept 1 2025) - resolve live per nationality; per-country stay 15/30/90 days. (2) JAPAN eVISA - single-entry, tourism-only, ordinary passport, up to 90 days, eligible residences only; direct-online for AU/BR/KH/CA/SA/ZA/TW/UK/US, agency-mediated for CN/PH/VN + HK/IN/ID/MO/MN/KR/SG/AE; electronic issuance, display Visa Issuance Notice QR live at boarding (no PDF/screenshot). (3) Consular short-term visa via responsible mission or accredited agency/JVAC; China (all purposes) and PH/VN packaged tours are accredited-agency-only. Photo 45x35mm. Fees reciprocity-based, set per mission, some waived. Processing min 5 working days. Verified live mofa.go.jp 2026-07-20.
